calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Plaintiff: John E. Anderson, present in pro per, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Cecilia E. Llarena.
Exhibit 1 - Copy of written contract dtd 08-30-96-------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Copy of written contract dtd 05-15-01-------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 3 - Copy of Breakdown of payments---------------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages $16,848.00
Prejudgment Interest $4,207.00
Costs $303.50
Plaintiff to prepare Judgment for signature.

Judgment granted for the total of $21,463.50, signed by VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-10-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
